sections.heading: 1. Who we are
sections.body: OfferCare.ai operates a Maryland nursing home per-diem staffing platform. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect clinician information when you apply at /join.

sections.heading: 2. Information we collect
sections.body: Application data includes your name, email, mobile phone, credential type, Maryland license number, NPI (when required), home ZIP, minimum pay rate, and portal password. We also store credentialing results, shift dispatch history, SMS reply logs, and portal activity.

sections.heading: 3. How we use information
sections.body: We use your data to verify licenses, match you to local open shifts, send shift offers by SMS/email/push, record shift locks and placements, maintain COMAR compliance audit trails, and improve dispatch quality.

sections.heading: 4. SMS and communications
sections.body: With your explicit consent, we send automated shift-offer texts. Reply STOP to opt out or YES to accept a shift. Message and data rates may apply. We do not sell your phone number to third-party recruiters.

sections.heading: 5. Credential verification
sections.body: You authorize automated checks against MBON, OIG LEIE, and Maryland judiciary exclusion sources. Results are stored for compliance and may be shared with assigned facilities when you lock a shift.

sections.heading: 6. Sharing
sections.body: We share necessary placement data with nursing homes where you accept shifts and with payroll/compliance vendors under contract. We do not sell personal information.

sections.heading: 7. Retention & security
sections.body: Records are retained as required for staffing, tax, and regulatory purposes. Access is restricted to authorized operations and compliance staff.

sections.heading: 8. Your choices
sections.body: Reply STOP to end marketing/shift-offer texts. Contact compliance@offercare.ai to request access, correction, or deletion where applicable law allows.

sections.heading: 9. Changes
sections.body: We may update this policy by posting a new version on /join. Material changes require re-acceptance on apply.
